fields.Name: Lists
fields.Description: Mailchimp audiences (lists) — the top-level subscriber groupings

fields.Name: ListMembers
fields.Description: Subscribers/contacts within an audience (parent-child under Lists)

fields.Name: Campaigns
fields.Description: Email campaigns (regular, automated, A/B, RSS, etc.)

fields.Name: EcommerceProducts
fields.Description: Products in a connected e-commerce store (parent-child under EcommerceStores)

fields.Name: EcommerceOrders
fields.Description: Orders in a connected e-commerce store (parent-child under EcommerceStores)

fields.Name: BatchOperations
fields.Description: Async batch job status records — POST /batches creates jobs (read status here)

fields.Name: ListMergeFields
fields.Description: Merge field definitions per list (FNAME, LNAME, etc.)

fields.Name: ListMemberNotes
fields.Description: Notes on list members (child of ListMembers)

fields.Name: ListMemberTags
fields.Description: Tags on individual members (child of ListMembers)

fields.Name: ListClients
fields.Description: Email client usage stats per list

fields.Name: EcommerceOrderLines
fields.Description: Line items on orders (child of EcommerceOrders)

fields.Name: EcommerceCartLines
fields.Description: Line items in carts (child of EcommerceCarts)

fields.Name: EcommercePromoCodes
fields.Description: Promo codes under rules (child of EcommercePromoRules)
